name: Santa Stars Shooter
description: Welcome to our newest Christmas theme game Santa Stars Shooter. The game has 20 levels with different difficulty. The goal of the game is for Santa Claus to shoot the Christmas stars with snowballs. The game has great graphics and movements. Enjoy this shooting game and Happy New Year and a Merry Christmas!
instructions: Use your mouse to play this game or tap on the screen
tags: 1 Player, Christmas, Fun, Kids, Shooter, Shooting, Winter
